name: Slow Cooker Mexican Carnitas
recipeIngredient: 1 pound lean boneless pork, cut into small cubes
10 oz frozen French style green beans, partially thawed
recipeInstructions:
Serves 3 to 4
Place the green beans in the Crock-Pot. Top with onion, pimiento, seasoned salt and pepper; add the cubed pork. Cover and cook on Low for 7 to 9 hours.
Double recipe for a 5-quart Crock-Pot.
